creator: delphij@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Ed Maste from comment #15)
Yes (along with leap-seconds update (2acec38b91fdf8520ca1ca6aebbde5c527040d14 / 832c63f5e07e6f960d051747ccb4358695a393ec)).

I'm still waiting for a decision about where do we fetch the leap seconds file from, ideally we should do all three changes together, but this + leap second update should buy us some time too.
